default.heading: Western Standoff
default.body: Face off in a one-on-one quick-draw bracket. First clean shot wins the duel.

default.heading: Calibrate Back-to-Back
default.body: When your duel starts, stand back-to-back with your rival and tap the calibration button while facing away.

default.heading: Wait For The Draw
default.body: Take three paces apart. When the TV calls the draw, turn around, raise your phone sideways like a revolver, then tap to fire.

default.heading: Clean Shot Only
default.body: Shots only count after the draw and only when you're fully turned and aiming in a landscape pose. Win your duels to claim the title.
